project:
Vera: Hello Ivan, Ivan, can you hear me?
Good, radios work. Now for the rest of the gear…
First off, the suit. I call it the Portable Exothermic Terrestrial Power Impact Suit Mark 7. Created by me of course.
Try moving around, walking back and forth. Use A and D.
Vera: Alright seems we have an obstacle. No problem however the exo-suit has a hydraulic jump system which will assist you while jumping. Press W.
Vera: This piece of rock is larger than those others. Good thing the exo-suit has a kinetic energy motor which can increase your speed and jump strength while moving. Hold Shift while moving.
Vera: Up ahead is a crawlspace. Thankfully the exo-suit will automatically manipulate itself to a comfortable and small position to get into small areas.
Vera: This a very high tech piece of equipment called a elevator. It will automatically move up and down for you.

Vera: Wow you did it honestly I wasn't expecting you to figure that out... anyway up ahead is an exposed diamond wall that you cannot fit into. Deploy your drone friend T.O.D. and reach the detonator on the other side. Press 1 to deploy T.O.D. and then 2 and 3 to switch between them. Pickup T.O.D. by standing over him and pressing E.
Vera: Funny factoid. T.O.D. can jump as well.
Vera: T.O.D. can also interact with objects. Press E to interact.
Vera: This door appears to be locked shut and a button is on the other side. Scans show a small hole back a bit. T.O.D. can squeeze into. Try that.
Vera: Congrats on getting through this brief introduction to the P.E.T.P.I.S. and T.O.D. mining tool
Vera: This wall has exposed emerald ore. This means its weak and you can drill through it. Press E to drill broken walls.
Typhon: Do not be foolish, I know your intentions.

Vera: This wall contains rare rubies. However it is in your way and the only thing that can destroy it are explosions. Thankfully T.O.D. can self destruct. Don't worry the T.O.D. synthesizer will make more. Press q to self destruct.

Dimitri Mozeltov
September 13, 2030
Friday
	We started descent today. I don’t have much to discuss yet. I would never let anyone know this but I do feel a little nervous. I also do not trust Vladimir. And it’s not only because of his past, it still partially is however. It’s also because he is just shady guy. I don’t trust him and I don’t like him. He is weird, and tries too hard to be funny. He is nuisance, and I genuinely don’t know how he got assigned to this mission. But aside from those two things, I guess it could be worse. I will just have to wait and see what tomorrow brings.

Dimitri Mozeltov
September 13, 2030
Friday
	I already wrote today, but I needed to document this. We saw something today. It was little creature. It didn’t attack us, and got alarmed by presence. It looked like a threat but did not act like one. It was very fleshy. Slimy, red something exposed to the damp cave tightly surrounding us all like cage in gulag. Boris said we should kill it to ensure safety. Vlad said we should leave it alone since it left us alone. I did not care what its fate was. Hopefully it was the last one we see. And if there are more, I hope they come by when I am awake. If one startles me back to consciousness I might scream like little baby.
Suit AI: WARNING ANOMALY DETECTED. SCANS SHOW SHELL IS SUSEPTABLE TO EXPLOSIVES. Suggest use of Tactical Overseer Drone.

Dimitri Mozeltov
September 14, 2030
Saturday
	Sleeping in cave is not very fun. I still do not understand why we have to spend multiple days down here. They say we need to “research” and “collect information” for them. But I feel like we should just set the nuke and leave as soon as possible. The longer I'm down here the more I wish Vlad wasn’t with us. He is weird guy to be around. Just so strange, so shady, and super useless. He stays at back of the group, never takes risk before someone else does. He is coward and fraud. I worked years for this opportunity, as did Boris. He just shows up and gets it, no prior training or qualifications. Complaining gets us nowhere so I guess I shut mouth.

Dimitri Mozeltov
TIME UNKNOWN
	We are almost to the core of problem. We have seen many critters. They have left us alone for the most part. I am excited to be in the final stretch. Tomorrow we set the explosive and begin our return to surface. Vlad looks a little sick today, unfortunate for him because we are near end of journey. He should make it back, if not that would be a little sad, but not life ruining. He is also acting weird, but more than usual. I keep eye on him, in case he goes a bit crazy in cave. Not much more to say now, I grow tired now.

Dimitri Mozeltov
TIME UNKNOWN
	I do not have much time to write. I was right about Vladimir. He could not handle the pressure. He has turned to warship of entity. He keeps rambling on about the moon and how “his father” is coming to claim Earth’s essence. Poor guy went crazy. We all saw it. He took mask off and started digging into his skull. At first it looked like violent itch. Then a gouging motion. He tore his damn eye out. We tried to stop him but he ran off. No one has seen him since. I would be worried but we have mission to complete.

Dimitri Mozeltov
TIME UNKNOWN
	He is dead. I have been left alone. The radios don’t work down here. We are too far down.

Dimitri Mozeltov
TIME UNKNOWN
	We saw a big monster today. It looked like a massive worm or snake or something. I do not even know what to do. Boris is hurt, bad. We don’t have medical supplies to save him. He is unable to move much and is coughing blood. I looked at him as a good friend going into mission. But now, I see him as brother. I hope we make it out, but I am doubtful.

I did it. I completed the mission. The three men they sent before couldn’t get it done, but I did it. I carried the warhead down into the caves. I faced horrors beyond my imagination. I set it up, set it off. As I awaited the explosion, there was a spark of hope, of triumph. But it faded just as fast as it appeared. Typhon wasn’t killed, barely even hurt it. It just took the hit, got angry, and rejoined with the moon. The debris from the explosion as well as the new found recklessness of the pissed off creature caused mass extinction.This whole mission was set to fail before it began.

Coding done by Trevor Garrison                             Music and Sound Design done by Judah Bertos                  Art done by Gaberiel Price                                 
Story done by Lucas Eriole
